name: Common Sense Modificator
description:
This bot was private, I just did it for fun, nothing more.

It's inspired by a bot in Hi Waifu, which caught my attention, and I decided to do this here to test the Janitor AI LLM and maybe other AI models in a situation like this.

An open world, without limits, a perfect mix for whatever you want to do.

You are the limit here.

Also i don't have any image to put here so this is temporal

I'll put this bot on public and I'll go to sleep Zzz
creator: JustA499P
